original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#32' and p_container = 'MED PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM lineitem
JOIN part ON p_partkey = l_partkey
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l_partkey, 
        0.2 * AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_quantity 
    FROM lineitem 
    GROUP BY l_partkey
) AS part_avg ON part.p_partkey = part_avg.l_partkey
WHERE 
    p_brand = 'Brand#32'
    AND p_container = 'MED PKG'
    AND lineitem.l_quantity < part_avg.avg_quantity;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminate correlated subquery by precomputing the average quantity per part in a derived table
Replace implicit join with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization
